title.en: Wheelchairs - Part 1: Determination of static stability
title.zh: 轮椅 - 第1部分：静态稳定性的测定

standards.abstract: Specifies test methods for determining the static stability of wheelchairs. Confirmed in 2020. Part of the ISO 7176 series covering wheelchair requirements and test methods.
standards.scope: Static stability testing for manual and powered wheelchairs.

title.en: Wheelchairs - Part 8: Requirements and test methods for static, impact and fatigue strengths
title.zh: 轮椅 - 第8部分：静态、冲击和疲劳强度的要求和试验方法

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and test methods for static, impact and fatigue strengths of wheelchairs. Confirmed in 2020.

title.en: Wheelchair seating - Part 15: Selection, placement and fixation of flexible postural support devices in seating
title.zh: 轮椅座椅 - 第15部分：座椅中柔性姿势支撑装置的选择、放置和固定

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for the selection, placement and fixation of flexible postural support devices within seating devices and systems including wheelchairs, shower chairs, and hoists.
standards.scope: Flexible postural support devices for wheelchair and seating systems.

title.zh: 辅助产品 - 分类和术语

standards.abstract: Establishes a classification of assistive products, especially produced or generally available, for persons with disability. Edition 7.
standards.scope: Classification and terminology for assistive products for persons with disabilities.

title.en: Wheelchairs - Part 14: Power and control systems for electrically powered wheelchairs and scooters - Requirements and test methods
title.zh: 轮椅 - 第14部分：电动轮椅和电动代步车的动力和控制系统 - 要求和试验方法

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and test methods for the power and control systems of electrically powered wheelchairs and scooters, including battery chargers. Edition 4.
standards.scope: Power systems, control systems, and chargers for electric wheelchairs and mobility scooters.

title.en: Washer-disinfectors - Part 7: Requirements and tests for washer-disinfectors employing chemical disinfection for non-critical thermolabile medical devices and health care equipment
title.zh: 清洗消毒器 - 第7部分：对非关键热不稳定医疗器械和保健设备采用化学消毒的清洗消毒器的要求和试验

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for washer-disinfectors for cleaning and chemical disinfection of reusable items such as bed frames, wheelchairs, and aids for persons with disabilities. Edition 2.
standards.scope: Cleaning and disinfection of wheelchairs, bed frames, and assistive devices.
